content: Customers can request refunds within 30 days of purchase. Refunds are processed within 5 business days after approval.
Employees receive 20 days of paid leave annually. Unused leave can be carried forward for up to 5 days.
Employees are entitled to 12 weeks of paid parental leave following the birth or adoption of a child.
The company provides medical insurance coverage for employees and their dependents.
Employees receive an annual professional development budget of $1000.
Performance reviews are conducted twice a year in June and December.
Promotion decisions are based on performance reviews, business needs, and demonstrated impact.
Employees must provide 30 days notice before leaving the company.
Employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval.
Business travel expenses including flights, hotels, and meals are reimbursable.
Every employee receives a company laptop and is responsible for maintaining it.
Employees must enable multi-factor authentication and complete annual security awareness training.
Customer data must be handled according to company privacy guidelines and regulatory requirements.
Employee benefits include health insurance, paid leave, parental leave, training budgets, and remote work flexibility.
